titleStmt.title: SII 28.29: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 29. (A.R. No. 29 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, on the south base of the maṇḍapa in front of

p.hi: Māṟavarmaṉ Tribhuvanachakravartti Kulaśēkharadēva (II) Year 19, Tulā śu. 13, Friday, 1332 A.D., October 2 (?).

summary.p: Ends of lines builtin. Fragmentary. Records the royal endowment of the village Abhaṅgarāhuttarāyanallūr for the expenses of worship on the day of the birth asterism of the king and at a Abhaṅga-rāhuttarāyaṉ-sandhi instituted by the king after his own name. The royal order was addressed to the tānattār of Kuraṅkāḍutuṟai-uḍaiyār-Kuṟṟam-poṟuttaruḷiya-nāyāṉār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟupaṉmar tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 9 Āvatu tulānāyaṟṟu purvvapakṣattu trayodadhiyum veThe continuation of the lines lost.
kkuraṅkāṭu tuṟai Uṭaiyār kuṟṟam poṟuttaruḷiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattāṟku Iṉṉāyanāṟku namperāl kaṭṭiṉa Abhaṅgarāhuttarāyaṉ cantikkum janmanakṣatram pūThe continuation of the lines lost.
Āṉa Abhaṅgarāhuttarāya nallūrkku kiḻpāṟkellai Iṉṉāyaṉār tiruvirupp is written below the line.pu IṟaiyilikkuThe continuation of the lines lost.
Digital edition of SII 28.29 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
